## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to the related issue.
- [ ] The PR title follows the project commit/PR convention.
- [ ] The implementation avoids unrelated refactors.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when needed.
- [ ] Tests or verification steps were run.
- [ ] No unverified AI-generated reports were committed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private data were added.
